chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4360 of 2020 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.18350/2020 2.For hearing of main case. 27.01.2025 Mr.Muhammad Mushtaq, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner shall submit reply to the issuing authority for adjudication of the impugned notice and the same shall be determined vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending adjudication no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) submits that it would be just and proper to disposed of this petition as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
